user.title: YouTube Background
user.description:
YouTube Background sets YouTube playlists as backgrounds for your Lovelace dashboards based on Home Assistant entity states.

**Optional API key**

You can provide a **YouTube Data API v3** key to enable playlist search by name and playlist validation in the configuration panel.

If you leave it blank, the integration still works — users can paste a YouTube playlist URL or playlist ID manually.

**Get an API key**

1. Open Google Cloud API Library: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/youtube.googleapis.com
2. Create or select a Google Cloud project
3. Enable **YouTube Data API v3**
4. Go to **APIs & Services > Credentials**
5. Create an **API key** and paste it here

After setup, go to **Settings > YouTube Background** to create dashboard mappings.

init.title: YouTube API Settings
init.description: This API key is optional. Add a YouTube Data API v3 key to search playlists by name and validate playlist links. Without it, you can still paste playlist URLs or playlist IDs manually.
